productName: Stingers - 2pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Super Boof - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Super Boof and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
